items.title: 2001 Lakers.
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
2001 Lakers.
2026 Knicks.

With their 8th straight road playoff victory in Game 2, New York has tied the 2001 Lakers for the longest road win streak in a single postseason in NBA history 🔥

The Knicks bring a 2-0 NBA Finals lead back to MSG for Game 3 on Monday at 8:30pm/et on ABC and ESPN. 🏆
